description:
Perform the end-of-quarter IT reconciliation for the organization. Execute all of the following in Snipe-IT:

Employee Departures — Alex Lee (alee) and Bianca Kumar (bkumar) have left the company. Check in all hardware currently assigned to them and set each returned asset's status to "Ready to Deploy". Deactivate both user accounts. Remove their Microsoft 365 Business Premium license seats.

New Hire Provisioning — Create two new employees: Marcus Rivera (mrivera, mrivera@example.com, password Snipe-IT2026!, Engineering department, HQ Building A) and Yuki Tanaka (ytanaka, ytanaka@example.com, password Snipe-IT2026!, Sales department, New York Office). Check out one "Ready to Deploy" laptop to each new hire. Assign each a Microsoft 365 Business Premium license seat.

Warranty Compliance Audit — Identify all currently deployed laptops whose warranties have expired (warranty expiration date before March 19, 2026). For each, update the status to "Out for Repair" and set the notes to "Q1-2026 AUDIT: Warranty expired — queued for vendor RMA". Do not modify laptops with active warranties or non-laptop assets.

Organizational Update — Rename the "Marketing" department to "Growth & Marketing". Create a new location called "Building C - Floor 3" with address 500 Innovation Drive, San Francisco, CA 94105. Update Priyanka Patel's (ppatel) default location to "Building C - Floor 3".
